events.name: GAME_END
events.description: Called when the battle at sea ends

events.name: UNIT_CLICK
events.description: Emits UI:{unitClickEvent} with { unitId } on ship click

events.name: END_TURN
events.description: Emits UI:{endTurnEvent} with {} on end turn

events.name: BUY_CANNONS
events.description: Emits UI:{buyCannonsEvent} with {} on buy cannons

events.name: PLAY_AGAIN
events.description: Emits UI:{playAgainEvent} with {} on play again / reset
